rationale: The proposed change concerns Tax Code homestead exemption amounts; the rule governs campaign treasurer filing requirements for specific-purpose committees. No overlap.
quote: If under this chapter a specific-purpose committee is required to file its campaign treasurer appointment with more than one authority, the appointment need only be filed with the commission and, if so filed, need not be filed with the other authorities.
_note: Rule text is unrelated to the proposed homestead exemption change; no conflict exists.
